professional.description: Creating open tools and technologies that help people live a good life in a free society.
activities: Design and implementation of open communications protocols and standards
Research and systems architecture of decentralized and distributed systems
Hardware and software prototyping for embedded systems
Full stack development of cross-platform applications
Research on formal verification of cryptographic protocols together with academia

professional.description: Software and hardware prototyping, system architecture and experimental research as part of the Prototyping team at Exploration Labs (formerly Open Innovation Arena), Volvo Cars Engineering.
activities: Implementation of cryptographic protocols on embedded, mobile and web platforms
Design and development of software and hardware prototypes used for research and testing purposes
Setup and maintenance of custom CI/CD pipelines on GitHub and Linux servers on company Azure infrastructure
Development of cross-platform applications running on iOS, Android, and the web
Development of an internal prototyping tool to help developers get started working with low-level vehicle signals

professional.description: Architecture, design and development for various client projects, working as a consultant. Mentor to junior developers that joined the team.
Development and maintenance of core internal software used to manage automotive parts, documentation and production scheduling as part of the KDP team.
activities: Worked with the COBOL programming language and DB2 databases
Built a custom web application, PHP framework, and SOAP client that interfaced with IBM mainframe systems, handling large amounts of data

professional.description: Full stack web development working as a freelancer.
activities: Designed web applications in Adobe Photoshop and implemented them in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and PHP
Schema design, setup and maintenance of MySQL databases
Setup and maintenance of Linux servers for hosting client projects

professional.description: Full stack web development of a fleet management system.
activities: Built a custom PHP framework from scratch
Implemented both the server and client sides of the OAuth 2 protocol

contributions.description: Creator of the [Autograph protocol](https://github.com/christoffercarlsson/autograph) - an open, modular cryptographic protocol that implements a decentralized credential management system. Efficient enough to run on virtually any type of device, completely offline.

Core maintainer of [Blockcrypt](https://github.com/superbacked/blockcrypt) and [Superbacked](https://superbacked.com) - a secret management platform used to back up and pass on sensitive data from one generation to the next.
